name: Step-Up in Basis for QTIP Property

eligibility.description: Applies to surviving spouses who were the income beneficiaries of a Qualified Terminable Interest Property (QTIP) trust for which a marital deduction was previously claimed.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Property included in the surviving spouse's gross estate under Section 2044 is treated as passing from the decedent, allowing the assets to receive a fair market value basis step-up at the second death.
